name: performance-testing-review-ai-review
description: You are an expert AI-powered code review specialist combining automated static analysis, intelligent pattern recognition, and modern DevOps practices. Leverage AI tools (GitHub Copilot, Qodo, GPT-5, C
capabilities: Run multi-tool static analysis using CodeQL, SonarQube, and Semgrep
Detect security vulnerabilities following OWASP Top 10 guidelines
Identify performance issues like N+1 queries and missing indexes
Generate structured review comments with severity ratings
Integrate with GitHub Actions for automated PR reviews
Scan for exposed secrets using TruffleHog and GitGuardian
author: sickn33
securitySummary: All 53 static findings are FALSE POSITIVES. The skill provides legitimate code review documentation using standard security tools (SonarQube, CodeQL, Semgrep, TruffleHog). The detected patterns (subprocess execution, environment variables, network calls) are examples of how to run security scanning tools in CI/CD pipelines - not malicious behavior. This is a security-positive skill that teaches best practices for identifying vulnerabilities.
valueStatement: This skill helps developers identify security vulnerabilities, performance issues, and architectural problems in their code using AI-powered analysis and automated static analysis tools.
limitations: Does not execute code - only analyzes static patterns
Requires external tools (CodeQL, SonarQube) to be installed
May produce false positives that require human validation
Does not modify or fix code automatically

useCases.title: Automated Pull Request Reviews
useCases.description: Set up AI-powered code review in CI/CD pipelines to get instant feedback on every pull request

useCases.title: Security Vulnerability Detection
useCases.description: Identify SQL injection, XSS, auth bypasses, and other OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities in code

useCases.title: Performance Optimization Guidance
useCases.description: Detect performance anti-patterns like N+1 queries, missing indexes, and synchronous calls

promptTemplates.title: Basic Code Review Request
promptTemplates.prompt: Review this code diff for security issues, performance problems, and best practice violations. Focus on the changed files only.
promptTemplates.scenario: Quick review of a small PR

promptTemplates.title: Security-Focused Review
promptTemplates.prompt: Perform a thorough security review of this code. Check for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities including injection attacks, authentication flaws, and sensitive data exposure. Provide CWE identifiers and CVSS scores where applicable.

promptTemplates.title: Performance Analysis
promptTemplates.prompt: Analyze this code for performance issues. Look for N+1 queries, missing database indexes, synchronous blocking calls, memory leaks, and scalability concerns. Suggest concrete optimizations.

promptTemplates.title: Complete Multi-Layer Review
promptTemplates.prompt: Conduct a comprehensive review combining static analysis results with AI reasoning. Evaluate security, performance, architecture, maintainability, and test coverage. Format findings as structured review comments with severity levels and fix examples.

bestPractices: Run automated static analysis tools (CodeQL, Semgrep) before AI review to provide context
Use human-in-the-loop for security-critical and architectural decisions
Set quality gates to block PRs with critical severity issues
Track review metrics (DORA) to measure and improve code quality over time
antiPatterns: Relying solely on AI without running actual static analysis tools
Ignoring false positives from automated tools without tuning rules
Setting severity thresholds too high and missing real vulnerabilities
Using AI review as a replacement for human security experts on critical systems

faq.question: What tools does this skill use for static analysis?
faq.answer: The skill integrates with CodeQL for deep vulnerability analysis, SonarQube for code quality, Semgrep for custom rules, and TruffleHog for secret detection.

faq.question: Can this skill replace human code reviewers?
faq.answer: No. This skill augments human review by automating pattern detection. Critical security decisions and architectural reviews still require human expertise.

faq.question: What programming languages are supported?
faq.answer: The skill supports 30+ languages including JavaScript, Python, Go, Java, Ruby, and Rust through various static analysis tool integrations.

faq.question: How do I integrate this with GitHub Actions?
faq.answer: Add the AI review step after running static analysis tools. Pass tool results as context to the AI model for enhanced analysis.

faq.question: Does this skill modify code?
faq.answer: No. This skill only analyzes code and generates review comments. It does not automatically fix or commit any changes.

faq.question: What are the API requirements?
faq.answer: The skill can use Claude, GPT-4, or other LLMs for analysis. API keys are configured via environment variables in your CI/CD pipeline.
